summary: Iteration 7 testing completed - P2 features (Self-Improvement Loop and Multi-Agent Architecture) fully functional. All 37 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI working correctly after fixing one bug (toFixed on undefined).

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toFixed') when session.performance.replyRate is undefined

critical_code_review_comments: Self-Improvement Engine: All endpoints working correctly - status, analyze, rules, apply-to-draft, phrases, history, feedback
Multi-Agent Architecture: All 5 agent types returned correctly (Research, Outreach, Optimization, Intelligence, Coordinator)
Multi-Agent: execute-single, execute-multi, tasks, teams, chat, history all working
Frontend Self-Improvement page loads correctly with stats cards, tabs, and all functionality
Frontend Multi-Agent page loads correctly with agent cards, tabs, and all functionality
Agent Teams creation and listing working in Multi-Agent page
Chat with Agent functionality working with session management

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, forms work, navigation works)

seed_data_creation: TEST_Sales Research Team created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested. Self-Improvement at /self-improvement (sidebar: Self-Learning) - has Overview, Rules, Winning Phrases, Apply to Email tabs. Multi-Agent at /multi-agent (sidebar: Multi-Agent) - has Execute Task, Agent Teams, Chat with Agent, History tabs. Key endpoints: GET /api/self-improvement/status, POST /api/self-improvement/analyze, GET /api/self-improvement/rules, PUT /api/self-improvement/rules/{id}, POST /api/self-improvement/apply-to-draft, GET /api/self-improvement/phrases, GET /api/self-improvement/improvement-history, POST /api/self-improvement/feedback. Multi-Agent: GET /api/multi-agent/types (returns 5 agents), POST /api/multi-agent/execute-single, POST /api/multi-agent/execute-multi, GET /api/multi-agent/tasks, POST /api/multi-agent/team/create, GET /api/multi-agent/teams, POST /api/multi-agent/chat, GET /api/multi-agent/history.

frontend: Stats cards (Emails Analyzed, Patterns Found, Active Rules, Improvements Applied) - PASS
Tabs (Overview, Rules, Winning Phrases, Apply to Email) - PASS
Rules tab - PASS (shows empty state correctly)
Tabs (Execute Task, Agent Teams, Chat with Agent, History) - PASS

self_improvement_status.details: Returns activeRules, rules, recentSessions, metrics with correct structure

self_improvement_analyze.details: Runs comprehensive analysis, returns sessionId, summary, performance, patterns, phrases, rules

self_improvement_rules.details: Returns list of rules with id, type, rule, priority, active, appliedCount. Toggle on/off works.

self_improvement_apply.details: Applies learned patterns to email draft, returns improved subject/body with changes list

self_improvement_phrases.details: Returns winning phrases categorized by type (subject, opening, cta, etc.)

multi_agent_types.details: Returns 5 agent types: research, outreach, optimization, intelligence, coordinator

multi_agent_execute_single.details: Executes task with single agent, returns executionId, agentType, agentName, result

multi_agent_execute_multi.details: Executes complex task with multiple agents, supports async execution

multi_agent_teams.details: Create and list custom agent teams with selected agents

multi_agent_chat.details: Interactive chat with specific agent, maintains session history

frontend_self_improvement.details: Page loads at /self-improvement, all tabs functional, Apply to Email works

frontend_multi_agent.details: Page loads at /multi-agent, all tabs functional, team creation works

sidebar_navigation.details: Self-Learning and Multi-Agent links visible and functional in sidebar

mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
mocked_apis.data_sources: Apollo.io, Clearbit, Crunchbase integrations are UI placeholders only

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toFixed')
